title: Galaxia's mod folder
description: Galaxia's epic mod folder for Crystal PvP
body:
# Galaxia's Mod folder for Fabric 1.21

This is a great mod combo for playing PvP gamemodes like Crystal PvP!

This mod folder has many optimization mods like 
**ImmediatelyFast, Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, MemoryLeak fixes** 

This modpack provides optimization and useful mods for crystal PvP, such as disabling the narrator to prevent accidental activation, removing hurtcam to eliminate screen shaking, and enabling full brightness for better visibility in dark areas.

It also has few useful mods for Crystal PvP that are allowed in the Official Crystal PvP Tier List like 
**NoNarrator, NoHurtCam, Full Brightness** 

**Feel free to contact me on discord if you have any questions galaxia_000**
